rules.title: Public API signature
rules.condition: the module is imported, it MUST expose a callable `calculate_cost(model: str, input_tokens: int, output_tokens: int, cache_write_tokens: int = 0, cache_read_tokens: int = 0) -> float` and MUST NOT expose mutable module-level state other than
rules.raw:
R1 - Public API signature
When the module is imported, it MUST expose a callable `calculate_cost(model: str, input_tokens: int, output_tokens: int, cache_write_tokens: int = 0, cache_read_tokens: int = 0) -> float` and MUST NOT expose mutable module-level state other than the pricing constants.

rules.title: Input validation
rules.condition: any of input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_write_tokens, cache_read_tokens is not an int (excluding bool) or is < 0, calculate_cost MUST raise ValueError and MUST NOT return a value
rules.raw:
R2 - Input validation
When any of input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_write_tokens, cache_read_tokens is not an int (excluding bool) or is < 0, calculate_cost MUST raise ValueError and MUST NOT return a value. When model is not a non-empty str after strip(), calculate_cost MUST raise ValueError.

rules.title: Cost formula
rules.condition: a model resolves to family f with input_rate=Pi/1_000_000 and output_rate=Po/1_000_000, calculate_cost MUST return input_tokens*Pi/1e6 + output_tokens*Po/1e6 + cache_write_tokens*Pi/1e6*1.25 + cache_read_tokens*Pi/1e6*0.10, with no rounding applied

value.target: input_tokens*Pi/1e6 + output_tokens*Po/1e6 + cache_write_tokens*Pi/1e6*1.25 + cache_read_tokens*Pi/1e6*0.10, with no rounding applied

obligations.text: MUST return input_tokens*Pi/1e6 + output_tokens*Po/1e6 + cache_write_tokens*Pi/1e6*1.25 + cache_read_tokens*Pi/1e6*0.10, with no rounding applied

rules.raw:
R3 - Cost formula
When a model resolves to family f with input_rate=Pi/1_000_000 and output_rate=Po/1_000_000, calculate_cost MUST return input_tokens*Pi/1e6 + output_tokens*Po/1e6 + cache_write_tokens*Pi/1e6*1.25 + cache_read_tokens*Pi/1e6*0.10, with no rounding applied.

rules.title: Unknown model handling
rules.condition: no key k in MODEL_PRICING satisfies normalized_model.startswith(k), calculate_cost MUST raise ValueError whose message includes

value.target: ValueError whose message includes the input model string and the sorted list of supported family keys

obligations.text: MUST raise ValueError whose message includes the input model string and the sorted list of supported family keys

rules.raw:
R4 - Unknown model handling
When no key k in MODEL_PRICING satisfies normalized_model.startswith(k), calculate_cost MUST raise ValueError whose message includes the input model string and the sorted list of supported family keys.

rules.title: Purity
rules.condition: calculate_cost is invoked, it MUST NOT perform I/O, MUST NOT read environment variables, and MUST NOT mutate any module-level object
rules.raw:
R5 - Purity
When calculate_cost is invoked, it MUST NOT perform I/O, MUST NOT read environment variables, and MUST NOT mutate any module-level object. Repeated calls with identical arguments MUST return bitwise-equal float results.

compile_errors.message: Rule must contain at least one parseable observable obligation, such as MUST return HTTP 409 or MUST NOT write a record.
